seoTitle: Add a Scrollable Design via Canva Quick Actions
metaDescription: Learn how to add a scrollable design using Canva's Quick Actions, a fast way to create dynamic, interactive layouts.
intro: Canva's Quick Actions menu offers shortcuts for common design tasks, including creating scrollable layouts that add motion and interactivity to your content. This is useful for showcasing products, portfolios, or storytelling content. This guide covers how to access and use that feature.

steps.heading: Open the Quick Actions panel
steps.body: Look for the Quick Actions icon in the toolbar, usually represented by a lightning bolt or magic wand symbol.

steps.heading: Find the scrollable design option
steps.body: Browse the available Quick Actions and select the one related to scrollable or animated layouts.

steps.heading: Apply it to your design
steps.body: Select the option and let Canva generate the scrollable structure based on your existing content.

steps.heading: Customize the resulting layout
steps.body: Adjust colors, text, and images within the new scrollable design to match your project.

steps.heading: Preview and share
steps.body: Play through the scroll effect to confirm it looks right, then export or share your finished design.

faq.question: Where exactly is the Quick Actions menu in Canva?
faq.answer: It's typically found in the toolbar above your canvas, marked with an icon that opens a panel of smart design shortcuts.

faq.question: Do I need Canva Pro for Quick Actions features?
faq.answer: Some Quick Actions are free, while more advanced AI-powered ones may require a Pro subscription.

faq.question: Can I undo a Quick Action if I don't like the result?
faq.answer: Yes, you can undo the change just like any other edit in Canva.

faq.question: Does the scrollable design work for both mobile and desktop viewing?
faq.answer: Yes, scrollable Canva designs adapt to both, though the experience can feel more natural on mobile.
